response.justification: Candidate has extensive software development experience (20+ years) but profile is heavily web/full-stack focused (TypeScript, Node.js, D) with minimal alignment to embedded LAN-switch firmware development. Critical gaps include no Japanese language proficiency (native-level required), no demonstrated C programming for UNIX/embedded systems in recent roles, no Linux kernel modification experience, and no security technology background (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption). C/C++ experience is limited to a brief role at National Instruments in 2000-2001.
strengths: Long software engineering tenure with full lifecycle ownership across multiple products
Some historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments on developer tooling
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD) which transfers to quality-focused embedded work
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed — hard requirement is native-level
No Linux kernel investigation or source modification experience
No security/networking domain knowledge (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3, switch chips, NETCONF/SNMP)
